name: Lady Gaga
bio: Lady Gaga's catalog continues to monetize through global streaming, broad playlist reach, and repeated sync or event-driven reuse.
notable_for: Big-chorus pop records with strong global replay and branding value.
career_highlight: Her biggest late-2000s and 2010s singles remain durable revenue generators.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming scale keeps the catalog commercially active.
Large playlist presence supports consistent repeat listening.
Film, event, and brand-adjacent usage reinforce long-tail value.
